name: Codex
notes: The built-in Codex profile now includes a recommended non-interactive `codex exec --sandbox workspace-write -` template, but commandMode stays manual until you opt in.
On the locally observed Codex CLI surface from 2026-04-08, `codex exec` accepted `--sandbox` but rejected `--ask-for-approval`, so keep the template aligned with your installed CLI version.
If Windows direct spawning of `codex` is unavailable on your machine, switch runnerCommand to a working local wrapper such as `cmd.exe` plus a matching argvTemplate.
